data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Apple employs a microservices architecture to enhance modularity and scalability across its platforms.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDN is used to accelerate content delivery through geographical distribution of servers.

data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Seamless integration with cloud services for enhanced storage and processing capabilities.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA)
data.description: Utilizing SPA for a more dynamic user interaction and improved load times.

data.title: Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
data.description: PWAs enable a native-like experience on the web with offline capabilities.
